programme.title: Weekend Sunrise
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with the team for all the latest entertainment, news, sport and weather.

programme.title: The Morning Show - Weekend
programme.desc: Join Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies to catch up on all the highlights from this week's program, including a variety of segments on the latest news and entertainment.

programme.title: Seven's Horse Racing
programme.desc: Live coverage of horse racing every Saturday.

programme.title: Seven News At 5
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: It's a race against time as a patrol boat is deployed to rescue a sinking vessel crammed with people. The bizarre behaviour of an unruly passenger has Customs wondering what may be the cause. Narrated by GRANT BOWLER.

programme.title: Seven News
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh's meeting up with neat freak Chantel Mila, aka 'Mama Mila'. Adam's making a one-of-a-kind drum. Colin's making chicken fricassee. Graham, Charlie and Melissa catch up with the designers from MIFS.

programme.title: Ooops I Bought A Pub!
programme.desc: Shane Jacobson buys a rundown country pub sight unseen and attempts to bring it back to life. With no experience, a massive renovation and a wedding looming, it's a chaotic race to finish in time.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: The incredible untold true story of Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan & Mary Jackson—brilliant African-American women working at NASA, who served as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history: the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit. This stunning achievement galvanized the world and inspired generations to dream big.

programme.title: TBA
programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: Devils
programme.desc: Massimo, determined to stop Dominic, hacks NYL servers with Subterranea's help to give the media proof of the scandal. But he and Sofia realises that Duval has his own anarchic interests.

programme.title: Devils
programme.desc: Armed with the dossier, Massimo is finally able to defeat Dominic and also uncovers the identity of the killer responsible for his colleague's death. With Dominic disgraced and his own name cleared Massimo takes his place as CEO of the bank.

programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts all new episodes of the educational and entertaining show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: House Of Wellness
programme.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Sunday Footy Feast
programme.desc: Catch up on the key stories from the round so far, plus hear from players around the country with the inside word on the game.

programme.title: House of Wellness
programme.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: An inebriated snowboarder causes trouble at the airport. Two mail centre packages add up to one deadly surprise. The Inland Enforcement Team hunts for a wanted sex-offender on the streets of Vancouver.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Dr Chris head to North Sydney to discover whether it truly offers something for everyone. Charlie shares his top tips for citris trees. Juliet shares some ideas to add texture to living spaces.

programme.title: Seven News At 5
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: Mel gets an exclusive look at the restoration of our most historic ships, Luke visits Griffith to taste their culture, and Sally catches up with Somer to celebrate a decade of deliciousness at Anason.

programme.title: Seven News
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: The 1% Club is a game show like no other! Unlike most quizzes, they don't need to brush up on general knowledge to do well. All they need is logic and common sense. Hosted by comedian Jim Jefferies.

programme.title: 7NEWS Spotlight
programme.desc: A series of investigative specials focusing on major breaking news events and long-form investigations of national significance.

programme.title: Betrayal
programme.desc: When a meeting with an informant turns fatal, out-of-favour MI5 agent John is determined to prove there's a threat to national security.

programme.title: Betrayal
programme.desc: John is convinced that he's uncovered an assassination plot, but his colleagues are sceptical. Meanwhile, John discovers his wife is getting attention from a colleague.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Follow police as they hunt for two rapists. They race to stop a recent offender striking again. Can cutting-edge forensic techniques help catch a rapist who has evaded justice?

programme.title: A Friend Of The Family
programme.desc: Mary Ann sets a boundary with B., but too late. Distracted by their disintegrating marriage, Bob and Mary Ann see Jan slip through their fingers once again as she leaves for Wyoming with B.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Time is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quickest quiz where contestants are given their prize money from the start but must race to keep hold of it. Only one can make the final and a chance to win big.
